name: Specialist referral using thanks very much for seeing
ocr_text:
===== EMBEDDED PDF TEXT =====
Dr Example Specialist
Dear Surgeon,
Re: Mrs Morgan Example
DOB: 03/03/1973
Thanks very much for seeing Morgan. Morgan has progressive left hip osteoarthritis and I feel the best option is to discuss joint replacement.
Kindest Regards,
Dr Example Specialist
